title: haplophyllum obtusifolium
intro: Haplophyllum obtusifolium, also known as Persian spurge or Ziarbaf, is a flowering plant native to Iran and parts of the Middle East, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Haplophyllum obtusifolium include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antibacterial and antifungal activities, which can help prevent infections and promote overall well-being. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
